results.rendered_html: gūrti (von gur) f. Beifall, Lob; Schmeichelwort: taṃ gūrtayo nemanniṣaḥ parīṇasaḥ samudraṃ na saṃcaraṇe saniṣyavaḥ  ṚV. 1,56,2 . śiśuṃ na yajñaiḥ svadayanta gūrtibhiḥ 9,105,1 . yaṃ te svadāvansvadanti gūrtayaḥ paure chandayase havam  VĀLAKH. 2,5 . uta tyā me raudrāvarcimantā nāsatyāvindra gūrtaye yajadhyai  ṚV. 10,61,15 .
